summary: A Fox News segment (anchor Jesse Watters at NYC-skyline desk, 'KRISTI NOEM TOURS EL SALVADOR PRISON' and 'NOEM HAS A MESSAGE FOR CRIMINAL ILLEGALS' lower-thirds, 'TEXT JESSE @' show banner) walking through Noem's CECOT tour: the armory of machine guns, gang members lined against walls, shaved-head tattooed prisoners 'packed together like sardines,' then Noem's @Sec_Noem warning delivered in front of a cell. It is host commentary over the agency-supplied footage, a recorded TV news package rather than stylized or music-driven youth-appeal content, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; 'KRISTI NOEM TOURS EL SALVADOR PRISON'; 'NOEM HAS A MESSAGE FOR CRIMINAL ILLEGALS'; 'TEXT JESSE @ (929) 286-7479'; 'TECOLUCA, EL SALVADOR'; '@SEC_NOEM / X'
